introSection: Pepsi-Cola Loop is a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Azadi Park in Sulaymaniyah, Sulaymaniyah, Iraq.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The coaster was new to the First Leisure organisation at Rhyl's Ocean Beach Fun Fair in May 1991.

In 1994, it operated at the Nottingham Goose Fair.

In 2008, the coaster was built up at Ffrith Beach Fun Parc. However, it never operated at this location.

fullText:
Pepsi-Cola Loop is a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Azadi Park in Sulaymaniyah, Sulaymaniyah, Iraq.

The coaster was new to the First Leisure organisation at Rhyl's Ocean Beach Fun Fair in May 1991.

In 1994, it operated at the Nottingham Goose Fair.

In 2008, the coaster was built up at Ffrith Beach Fun Parc. However, it never operated at this location.



Red track and white supports.
